message.content: The screenshot displays a dark-themed web interface for "DVYS" (with "LUCKYJET" branding) featuring a central light gray placeholder area (likely for content), a "Retour" (back) button, and a prediction result showing "3.19x" (69% accuracy). Below, text describes "L'intelligence DVYS en action 8 modules de prediction" with tags like "TENDANCE," "SERIES," "VOLATILITE," etc. The top-right corner shows "Lucky Jet," and the header includes "En vol #20."
